video_info.title: New Zealand Tour of England 2026
video_info.shortDescription: New Zealand reached 361/4 on Day 1 behind a massive 317-run opening partnership between Devon Conway (157) and Tom Latham (151). England fought back late in the final session, striking four times to split the momentum before stumps. Catch all the action from New Zealand Tour of England 2026, LIVE on Sony LIV.
video_info.longDescription: New Zealand reached 361/4 on Day 1 behind a massive 317-run opening partnership between Devon Conway (157) and Tom Latham (151). England fought back late in the final session, striking four times to split the momentum before stumps. Catch all the action from New Zealand Tour of England 2026, LIVE on Sony LIV.

video_info.title: India Tour Of Ireland 2026
video_info.shortDescription: Led by captain Shreyas Iyer, a fresh-faced Indian squad gears up to face Ireland in the series opener at Belfast, with all eyes on the explosive young prodigy, Vaibhav Sooryavanshi. Tune in to catch all the action from the 1st T20I of India Tour of Ireland 2026, LIVE & exclusively on Sony LIV.
